nodes.label: Lens, not a judge (compass principle)
nodes.rationale: Reframes the product from an omniscient truth judge to a lens that shows how content is built, simultaneously resolving legal (defamation) risk, the backfire effect, and the neutrality problem; every product/legal/UX/technical decision answers to it.

nodes.label: Claim Ledger
nodes.rationale: Replaces the single Truth Score with per-claim verifiability, evidence strength, source basis, confidence and citations, because a machine truth verdict triggers the backfire effect and defamation exposure.

nodes.label: Framing Signals (framing-as-inoculation)
nodes.rationale: Names persuasion techniques tied to the exact triggering quote; naming the technique in context is the inoculation payload, never shown without inspectable evidence.

nodes.label: Bridging perspective selection rule
nodes.rationale: Perspectives chosen by an explicit testable rule (topic match, moderate divergence band, Tier2+ evidence, low dehumanization) to prevent false balance rather than 'show the opposite'.

nodes.label: Source & tier policy (open signals)
nodes.rationale: Transparent, versioned tiering from open signals (IFCN, institutional domain suffixes, press councils) attaches to sources/citations only, never to a creator; credibility is about accountability and evidence, not ideology.

nodes.label: Feed Friction Dial (Wedge B north star)
nodes.rationale: A feed-reranking dial to dial down antidemocratic/animosity content; kept internal and gated because reranking moves f-Socials into an intervention system the DSA treats as a regulated surface — earn trust read-only first.

nodes.label: Cache-first unit economics
nodes.rationale: Hashing each input means a viral video is analyzed once and served to everyone from cache, socializing the LLM/transcription cost so the free public tier survives and feeds the institutional funnel.

hyperedges.label: Lens-not-a-judge compass shared across concept, spec, UX and user docs
